timeline.text: Built Raspberry Pi server and created the initial website
Enhanced design, fixed mobile UI alignment, improved SEO / accessibility
Added source code link and server icons, optimized usability
Implemented the Admin console and optimized usability
Updated Oracle Cloud content and fixed several bugs

plans: The current low-performance Raspberry Pi server struggles to host diverse services
Renting a high-performance arm64 server from Oracle Cloud to migrate some services
Running 24/7 services in addition to essential home-environment services
Plan to build an x64-based server for NAS and some AI features (available only at certain hours due to 24/7 constraints)
